version.author: Blue Kachina
version.changelog: 1.0.1: Fix ReaPack indexing (package was silently excluded after a provides/file-ownership conflict with a bundled library's demo file; force reindex now that the conflict is resolved). 1.0.0: Initial ReaPack release.

version.author: Blue Kachina
version.changelog: 1.0.2: Add tags (looper, loop, sampler, multitrack) for ReaPack categorization. 1.0.1: Fix ReaPack indexing (package was silently excluded after a provides/file-ownership conflict with a bundled library's demo file; force reindex now that the conflict is resolved). 1.0.0: Initial ReaPack release.

reapack.name: MidiNoteFilterByDrumType.jsfx
reapack.desc: MIDI Note Filter By Drum Type
